ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the size standard applies */,
  "size_xs" TEXT /* X-Small size according to the standard */,
  "size_s" TEXT /* Small size according to the standard */,
  "size_m" TEXT /* Medium size according to the standard */,
  "size_l" TEXT /* Large size according to the standard */,
  "size_xl" TEXT /* X-Large size according to the standard */,
  "size_xxl" TEXT /* XX-Large size according to the standard */,
  "size_xxxl" TEXT /* XXX-Large size according to the standard */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart for the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement set */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the clothing item (e.g., shirt, pants, dress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "restock_level" INTEGER /* Low stock level threshold for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hip measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., inventory manager, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee (e.g., inventory, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restocks" (
  "restock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restock event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity_added" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item added to inventory */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restocks_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restocks_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the item from the supplier */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Order quantity for the item */,
  "supplier_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "role_id")
)
